title: Bridge Essay: Episodic Visual Hallucinations, Inference and Free Energy.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.

**Episodic Visual Hallucinations, Inference and Free Energy.**. Entropy (Basel).. PMID: 39056919. DOI: 10.3390/e26070557. Understandings of how visual hallucinations appear have been highly influenced by generative approaches, in particular Friston's Active Inference conceptualization. Their core proposition is that these phenomena occur when hallucinatory expectations outweigh actual sensory data. This imbalance occurs as the brain seeks to minimize informational free energy, ameasure of the distance between predicted and actual sensory data in astationary open system.
